topic: I keep finding receipts in my jacket pockets for places I have never been
title: I Keep Finding Receipts in My Jacket Pockets for Places I Have Never Been | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I keep finding receipts in my jacket pockets for restaurants I have never been to.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a crumpled white paper receipt unfolded on a wooden tabletop, the printed text visible but slightly faded, a black jacket sleeve resting beside it, dim warm overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Office job. Same five restaurants near my apartment. Never eat out otherwise.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small modern apartment kitchen at dusk, takeout containers stacked on a clean white counter, a microwave clock visible reading seven forty, the room lit by a single under cabinet light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same jacket for three winters. Black wool. Two front pockets.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black wool peacoat hanging on a wooden coat rack near an apartment entryway, the brass buttons catching dim hallway light, the cuffs slightly worn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First receipt came in November. A diner in Toledo Ohio. I live in Boston.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a crumpled diner receipt held flat on a kitchen table, the header reading TOLEDO clearly printed at the top, scrambled eggs and coffee listed as line items, the receipt slightly yellowed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Dated last Tuesday. Two AM. Paid in cash.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper receipt timestamp area, the date and time visible in black ink at the top corner, the rest of the receipt out of focus, a wooden tabletop visible at the edge, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a hardware store in Tulsa. A gas station outside Memphis. A motel in Reno.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of three crumpled paper receipts laid flat side by side on a dark wooden coffee table, each with a different city header printed at the top, dim warm overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the diner. They had the order on file.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen held up showing an outgoing call to a Toledo area code number, the call duration ticking past two minutes, the kitchen counter visible behind the phone, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Server described me. My height. My jacket. My voice.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a notepad page on a wooden desk with handwritten notes including dates and city names, a coffee mug at the corner, a single desk lamp casting warm light across the page, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked my bank statement. No transactions in any of those cities.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing an online banking transaction list, only local Boston purchases visible, the cursor hovering over a date column, the surrounding desk dim, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I found a receipt for a flower shop in my own zip code.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small white florist receipt resting on the dark wool fabric of a peacoat pocket interior, the local zip code visible on the printed header, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two dozen white lilies. Card included. The shop showed me a photo of the card.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a photograph of a small folded white florist card with handwritten cursive on it, the surrounding image blurred, a hand holding the phone in a dim apartment kitchen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Addressed to my mother. She died ten years ago. The handwriting was mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single white lily resting on a folded handwritten note on a dark wooden table, the cursive handwriting visible but indistinct, dim warm overhead light casting soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
